title: Add Date, Previous Balance, and Total Amount fields to Transaction page

requirements.text: On the Transaction page form, add a Date field (date input, defaulting to today's date), a 'Previous Balance' field (read-only, auto-filled with the current account balance when an account number is selected), and a 'Total Amount' field (read-only, computed as Previous Balance + Amount for deposits or Previous Balance − Amount for withdrawals). Ensure these fields are visible, clearly labelled, and consistent with the existing colorful card-based mobile-first theme.

quotes: Transactions page मध्ये date आणि मागील शिल्लक रक्कम, एकुण रक्कम अश्या फिल्ड घ्या

acceptanceCriteria: The Transaction form displays a Date field that defaults to today's date and is editable by the admin.
When an account is selected, the 'Previous Balance' field is automatically populated with the current balance of that account (read-only).

The 'Total Amount' field is automatically computed: Previous Balance + Amount for Deposit, Previous Balance − Amount for Withdrawal, and updates in real-time as the Amount or Transaction Type changes (read-only).
All three fields are visually consistent with the existing transaction form styling (colorful, mobile-first, card-based layout).
The Date value is included when the transaction is saved to the backend.
The Total Amount value is included when the transaction is saved to the backend.

requirements.text: Update the backend Motoko transaction data model and addTransaction method to store the transaction date (as a Text or Int timestamp), previous balance (Nat or Float), and total amount (Nat or Float) fields if they are not already stored. Ensure existing CRUD methods (getTransactionsByAccount, getAllTransactions, getTransactionsByDateRange) return these new fields.

quotes: Transactions page मध्ये date आणि मागील शिल्लक रक्कम, एकुण रक्कम अश्या फिल्ड घ्या

acceptanceCriteria: The Transaction record type in the Motoko actor includes fields for date, previousBalance, and totalAmount.
The addTransaction method accepts and stores these three fields.
getAllTransactions, getTransactionsByAccount, and getTransactionsByDateRange return the date, previousBalance, and totalAmount for each transaction.
Existing stored transactions are not broken by the schema change (migration handles missing fields gracefully).

constraints: Do not modify any file under frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.ts, frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts, frontend/src/main.tsx, or frontend/src/components/ui.
All backend logic must remain in the single-actor backend/main.mo file.
Generate backend/migration.mo only if the transaction data model changes require stable storage migration.
nonGoals: Changing any other transaction form fields beyond Date, Previous Balance, and Total Amount.
Modifying the History page, Passbook page, or any other page layout.
Adding new backend CRUD endpoints beyond updating the existing transaction record type and addTransaction method.
